channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Fable delayed to February 2027
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

No longer due out this fall.

Publisher Xbox Game Studios and developer Playground Games have delayed Fable from its previously planned fall 2026 release window to February 2027.

“We talked about Forza Horizon 6 and how the team at Playground is doing really well,” Xbox chief content officer and executive vice president Mat Booty said on the Official Xbox Podcast. “Also doing really well on Fable. The game is in great shape. The team feels really good. We’re excited about where the game is. We want to make sure that that game has a window all to its own, so we are going to move it from this fall to February. And again, we really just want it to have its own moment to shine.”

Booty continued, “And related to Fable, we will be seeing more of it in [Xbox Games Showcase 2026]. So we’re going to have plenty for people to see. It really is coming together well, exciting stuff, and then we’re going to move to February.”

Fablewill be available for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store, as well as via Game Pass.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/fable-delayed-to-february-2027
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
